title: Vanilla2.0
description: Brings minecraft to the hight of its potential
body:
This modpack takes Minecraft to the peak of what it can be! It adds stuff like Distant horizons  for far render distance and Sodium for more FPS. It also completely revamps the terrain with Epic Terrain to make it realistic and for structures it adds a lot of YUNG’s mods to revamp the structures in Minecraft along with others to make the game look super pretty.

Important:
This pack uses a [fork of voxy](https://github.com/MCRcortex/voxy/tree/master) so it is not official i just made the 1.20.4 version on modrinth work with 1.21 so it is unofficial. all credit of the mod goes to cortex who gave me premission to use it 

Showcase video go to 7:19 for just B-Roll
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RHQycz74xrc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Cherry terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/013cd2bf2bd97e9dd28fb707f74ad66c8b2e45c3_0.webp)

It also has a bunch of quality of life mods like do a barrel roll to just make the game better using some mods to remaster the sound and also adding shaders to the game.
